dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
customers, restaurant staff, and delivery riders
What should users be able to do?
order food, track delivery, and pay online
Do users need login or authentication?
yes normal login, email or phone is fine
menus and tracking should load quickly

functional: The system shall allow users to log in using email or phone number.
The system shall allow customers to place food orders.
The system shall allow customers to track delivery status.
The system shall allow customers to pay online.
non_functional: The system shall load menus and delivery tracking information quickly.
The system shall process payments securely.
